stem:
Nigerian American artist Toyin Ojih Odutola uses black-ink pens to create highly detailed drawings of human figures. Her portrait of novelist Zadie _______ is displayed in the National Portrait Gallery in London.

Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
explanation: The subject “Her portrait of novelist Zadie Smith” runs straight into its verb “is displayed,” so no punctuation belongs between them. A colon, dash, or comma would wrongly break the subject from the verb.
